subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Nemba jishimikila pa muvyala obe umo ye bakashile na mambo a kwingijisha bizhima kutama.
topics: Mufunjishi abuule Bafunda kwambapo bishinka bimo byo bafunda. Apa bino ne aye apitulukemo
